basic_details.job_title: NHM Chandigarh Medical Officers Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The National Health Mission Chandigarh (NHM Chandigarh) has officially announced the Medical Officers Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification was published on 16-05-2026 at NHM Chandigarh Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 60 years and hold MBBS Degree from a recognized university with compulsory rotatory internship, Medical Council registration, and required experience can attend the walk-in interview on 25-05-2026. Direct links to download the notification and walk-in application details are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 60 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from recognized university with one year compulsory rotatory internship, Registered with State Medical Council or Medical Council of India-New Delhi, One House Job (six months) in any department or Minimum of six months of Post Qualification work experience
qualification.details: Emergency Medical Officer under NHM: Essential: MBBS Degree from recognized university with one year compulsory rotatory internship; Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi; One House Job (six months) in any department or Minimum of six months of Post Qualification work experience. Preferential: Experience in Casualty Department of Recognized Hospital; CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours. Medical Officer-MCH under NHM: Essential: MBBS Degree from recognized university with one year compulsory rotatory internship; Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi; One House Job (six months) in any department or Minimum of six months of Post Qualification work experience. Preferential: Experience in Gynae & Obs/Paeds Department of Recognized Hospital; CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours. Medical Officer-STC (NTEP) under NHM: Essential: MBBS Degree from recognized university with one year compulsory rotatory internship; Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi; One House Job (six months) in any department or Minimum of six months of Post Qualification work experience. Preferential: One year Experience in NTEP; Basic knowledge of Computers and Nikshay. Medical Officer/ GDMO under PMABHIM: Essential: MBBS Degree from recognized university with one year compulsory rotatory internship; Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi; One House Job (six months) in any department or Minimum of six months of Post Qualification work experience. Preferential: CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHM Chandigarh Medical Officers recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date, which is 25th May 2026. There is no separate last date for submitting an application form.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officers posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized university with one year of compulsory rotatory internship. Registration with the State Medical Council or Medical Council of India is mandatory, along with one House Job or six months of post-qualification work experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Medical Officers positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Medical Officer posts is 60 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officers posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 72,072 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Medical Officers?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Medical Officers posts announced by NHM Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for NHM Chandigarh Medical Officers recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF should be referred to for the exact venue address for the walk-in interview, as it is not provided in the summary data.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the interview venue.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Medical Officers positions?
faq.answer: The positions are on a contract basis, meaning the employment is for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the National Health Mission Chandigarh.
